block_02: Two new tech giants are now on IQ Option: virtual pinboard platform Pinterest and video-conferencing company Zoom.
block_03: Both companies had a strong market debut in April, with Pinterest rising almost 30% and Zoom skyrocketing above 70%* at the end of their first day of trading.
block_04: What does the future hold for these two tech startups?
block_05: Now could be a good time to make a prediction.
block_07: *Past performance is not an indicator of future performance.
